## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing project style.
- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where useful.
- [ ] I updated docs/assets/templates when behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, keystores, APKs, or personal backup files.
